title: Marketplace Coordinator – European E-Commerce
required_skills: Marketplace management (Amazon Seller Central / Otto Market / Kaufland Seller)
Product listings creation and optimization (content, SEO, A+)
bonus_skills: Additional languages: French, Italian or Polish
Degree in E-Commerce or Business Administration
matched_skills: KPI-driven approach / analytical mindset (KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
KPI monitoring (partial – KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
missing_skills: Marketplace management platform experience (Amazon Seller Central, Otto Market, Kaufland Seller)
core_responsibilities: Operational management and strategic development of national and Europe-wide online marketplaces
Creation and optimization of product listings (content, SEO, A+ content)
Management of product data via PIM system and channel-specific adaptation
Monitoring and steering of KPIs (visibility, conversion, advertising performance)
Planning and execution of promotions and marketplace campaigns
recommended_emphasis: Highlight KPI dashboard and ROI reporting experience to demonstrate data-driven approach
Emphasize multi-market promotion experience across EMEA as proxy for marketplace campaign execution
Stress cross-functional collaboration across marketing, sales and product management
Leverage competitive analysis and market research experience for marketplace analytics
Mention any e-commerce or online channel exposure, even indirect (e.g., digital GTM, online sales tools)
MBA and business administration background aligns with required qualification
